name: Iso11783OPOnKeyActivation
title: Iso11783OPOnKeyActivation
syntax: void Iso11783OPOnKeyActivation( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, dword parentID, dword keyCode, dword activation );
description: The function is called by the node layer, if the user presses a soft key or button.

parameters.name: objectID
parameters.description: Object ID of a soft key or button object

parameters.name: parentID
parameters.description: Object ID of the mask object

parameters.name: keyCode
parameters.description: Code of the soft key or button

parameters.name: activation
parameters.description: Activation code 0: Key is release 1: Key is pressed 2: Key is held 3: Press is canceled

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
